data.body: CLAIM-PHASE CHECKPOINT (HEAD frozen at 0fb8d17e6; claim-all-before-commit). CLAIMED (4): epic 9d50, ac0e (committed 0fb8d17e6 as stack bottom, docs), e1f2 (claimed, docs not yet edited), a37b. AWAITING RE-REVIEW after plan remediation (5, batch bpgajv9ug): 74d9 (eval-case+scorer not FakeRunner tautology; +plumbing test), 24ec (schema completion_verifier_fail_v1 + persistence-failure-branch test), d4cf (corrected FALSE 'ancestor carve-out' premise -> parent_plan injection is NEW work via det_floor.PlanContext/orchestrator._assemble_context_uncached/pass1._ticket_graph_blob; AC4 promotion-decision reframed in-session+deferred to 72b6), a8e5 (DET-hygiene hook at det_advisory/blocking_findings not pass3_over_findings; operator_attested injected in plan_review_decide; ac_unverifiable cleared upstream of impact_plan), 9f25 (corrected: calibrate_plan_review_thresholds.py is plan-review-only -> use dedicated code-review derivation script over code_review_result_v1 sidecars + ab_impact_model.py). AWAITING FIRST VERDICT (2): f32e, b9c0. All BLOCKs so far were SHARP/valid (calibration working well): unverifiable-post-deploy ACs, missing edit targets, false premises, tautological tests, schema mismatches. Reviews are non-deterministic (74d9 PASS then BLOCK on same plan = the 5e40 instability a8e5 fixes).
